meaning: 塔尔萨[美国俄克拉菏马州东北部城市]
examples: If I've got to go somewhere I may as well go to Tulsa.
Do you know the motorway to Tulsa? The airport road joins it.
Tulsa has seen its share of poverty and desperation over the years.
It was the second straight overtime game for Tulsa, which fell to Washington on Monday.
Tulsa had one last chance, but Glory Johnson's layup came just after the buzzer.
